---
title: "Eating_disorder_self-esteem_analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-06-03"
---

```{r}
install.packages('psych')
```

`
```{r}
# Eating Disorders & Self-Esteem Contingencies - Analysis Script
# Author: Matthew Gibbs

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(psych)


# Load and clean data
data <- read_csv("/Users/matthewgibbs/Documents/Prior Education /Sussex University Psychology/Year 3/Research Dissertation/Creating The Dissertation/Data/DissDataA+G.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

# Keep only complete responses (no zeros on key measures)
analytic <- data %>%
  filter(if_all(c(SC2, SC3, SC4, SC5), ~ .x != 0)) %>%
  mutate(
    Gender = factor(Gender, levels = c("1", "2"), labels = c("Male", "Female")),
    Age = as.numeric(Age),
    EDEQ = as.numeric(SC2),
    SCS = as.numeric(SC3),
    RSES = as.numeric(SC4),
    DERS = as.numeric(SC5)
  )

# Final sample size: 138 participants

# Descriptive statistics
descriptives <- analytic %>%
  summarise(
    n = n(),
    EDEQ_mean = mean(EDEQ), EDEQ_sd = sd(EDEQ),
    SCS_mean = mean(SCS), SCS_sd = sd(SCS),
    RSES_mean = mean(RSES), RSES_sd = sd(RSES),
    DERS_mean = mean(DERS), DERS_sd = sd(DERS)
  )

print(descriptives)

# Correlation matrix
cor_matrix <- analytic %>%
  select(EDEQ, SCS, RSES, DERS) %>%
  cor(use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

print(round(cor_matrix, 3))

# Hierarchical regression 

# Step 1: RSES + DERS
model_step1 <- lm(EDEQ ~ RSES + DERS, data = analytic)

# Step 2: Add SCS
model_step2 <- lm(EDEQ ~ RSES + DERS + SCS, data = analytic)

# Compare models
anova(model_step1, model_step2)

# Step 2 coefficients (final model)
tidy(model_step2, conf.int = TRUE) %>%
  filter(term != "(Intercept)")

# R-squared change
r2_step1 <- summary(model_step1)$r.squared
r2_step2 <- summary(model_step2)$r.squared
r2_change <- r2_step2 - r2_step1

cat("R² Step 1:", round(r2_step1, 3), "\n")
cat("R² Step 2:", round(r2_step2, 3), "\n")
cat("ΔR²:", round(r2_change, 3), "\n")

# Key visualisation 

# Scatter plot: EDE-Q vs Self-Compassion
ggplot(analytic, aes(x = SCS, y = EDEQ)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, color = "darkblue") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "red") +
  labs(
    title = "Eating Disorder Symptoms vs Self-Compassion",
    x = "Self-Compassion Scale (SCS)",
    y = "EDE-Q Total Score"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

# 7. Reliability (Cronbach's alpha) For EDE-Q subscales 
alpha_total <- psych::alpha(edeq_df)
cat("Total EDE-Q α:", round(alpha_total$total$raw_alpha, 2))
```
